riskFloorReasons: safety-invariant proximity: src/monitoring/SessionReaper.ts matches session reaper

causalAutopsy.notes: The reaper's candidacy map has been in-memory since it was written — fine on a stable server, a latent fragility under restart churn. Became the blocker only once #969 made the reaper correctly identify idle sessions AND the box started restarting every ~10min (SleepWake-under-load, same instability as the laptop-eventloop-stall finding). 2026-06-07 grounding: 6 restarts/70min, reaper saw 11 all-clear, reaped 0 because candidateSince reset each restart. No prior PR regressed it; durability was never needed until the churn exposed it. Fix A of the operator-requested A+B pair (B = fix the churn itself).
